---
title: "Gertrude Caroline Knollys"
---

## Gertrude Caroline Knollys

**Dates:** (1808/9-1880)

### Biography

There are payments to Miss G. Knollys from CMY\'s bank account, 1856, and a reference to a \'House of Recovery\' run by Miss Knollys.  It seems probable that Gertrude Caroline Knollys, who in the 1861 census was living at Hurstpierpoint with a number of boarders, is the person referred to on both occasions.

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 13th 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
